subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §14 Probability Mass Function and Cumulative Distribution Function
question: Let $X$ be a discrete random variable with cdf given by $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x < -4 \\ \frac{3}{10} & -4 \le x < 1 \\ \frac{7}{10} & 1 \le x < 4 \\ 1 & x \ge 4 \end{cases}$. Find a formula of $p(x)$.
